cases.description: Function Soft Threshold: forces the main output to zero, so coarse compilation passes but behavioral stimulus points fail.
Function Soft Threshold: keeps the main datapath plausible while reporting the wrong metric value.
Function Soft Threshold: mishandles reset or initialization, passing steady-state samples but failing startup or recovery checks.
Function Soft Threshold: uses a shifted or inverted decision condition that can pass one mode but fails boundary cases.
